query: Trump Gaza ceasefire international oversight body appointment update
a_issues: Content A lacks the key appointment update asked about. reasoning: The question asks for an update on the appointment of the international oversight body in Trump’s Gaza ceasefire plan. Between the two, Content B better enables that answer because it explicitly connects Phase Two, the Board of Peace, and the formation/first meeting of the body overseeing Gaza, while A mostly provides background plus the separate appointment of Ali Sha’ath to the technocratic Palestinian committee. A therefore misses the central appointment update more directly. Neither set is perfect, but B is closer to the needed facts and less likely to send the model to the wrong appointment.
